name: Cappuccino Parfait
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Thawed COOL WHIP Lite Whipped Topping
1 package Sugar-Free JELL-O Brand Pudding & Pie Filling (Chocolate or Vanilla Flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve MAXWELL HOUSE Coffee in water.
2. Stir the coffee mixture into thawed COOL WHIP Lite.
3. Prepare JELL-O Pudding according to package directions, using 2% lowfat milk. Allow to stand for 5 minutes.
4. Spoon pudding and whipped topping alternately into 6 dessert glasses.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
